interaction.\n- No signs of obfuscation, hardcoded secrets, or backdoors.\n\n**Confirmations on code presence:**\n- The code includes the ABI definitions, factory class, and import statements—all consistent with a typical autogenerated contract wrapper.\n- No discrepancies or missing components are evident.\n\n**Errors, flaws, or mistakes:**\n- None identified across all reports.\n- The not perform any malicious activity—no hidden code, no network calls, no data exfiltration.\n- The malware score of 0 is correct.\n\n**Consistency:**\n- All reports are consistent with each other and
